cta.title: Ready to launch your school workspace?
cta.description: Create your school account in under two minutes and invite your team.

LandingHero.title: One platform to run every school in your SMS SaaS.
LandingHero.description: Launch tenant onboarding, manage classrooms, track attendance, and automate billing with a clean, secure dashboard your admins and staff can trust.

items.title: Tenant-Isolated Architecture
items.description: Each school has strict data isolation with role-based controls.

items.title: Academic Operations
items.description: Manage students, staff, sections, and attendance in one workflow.

items.title: Billing & Subscription Ready
items.description: Track tuition, plan upgrades, and subscription lifecycle with confidence.

LandingPricing.title: Simple pricing for every school size
LandingPricing.description: Start free, then scale when your tenants grow.

Footer.copyright: © {year} Technet SMS SaaS. All rights reserved.

SignupPage.title: Start your SMS school in minutes.
SignupPage.description: We will create your tenant and your {role} account in one transaction. After verifying your email, you can sign in and manage staff, students, classes, and billing.

SignupForm.title: Create your school workspace
SignupForm.description: We will create a new tenant and your {role} account in one secure step.

slug.label: Subdomain Slug (optional)
slug.hint: Lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

messages.invalidForm: Please check the form fields and try again.
messages.createdEmailFailed: School account created, but we could not send the verification code yet. Please use Resend Code.
messages.createdSuccess: School account created. Check your email for the verification code.
messages.schemaOutdated: Database schema is out of date. Please run migrations and try again.
messages.createFailed: We could not create your account right now. Please try again.

schoolName.min: School name must be at least 2 characters.

email.invalid: Please enter a valid email address.

password.min: Password must be at least 8 characters.

slug.invalid: Please provide a valid school slug.
slug.pattern: Slug must be lowercase letters, numbers, and hyphens only.

messages.deviceDenied: Login request was denied by an approver.
messages.deviceExpired: Login approval request expired. Please try signing in again.
messages.deviceInvalid: Login approval request is no longer valid. Please sign in again.
messages.finishFailed: Unable to finish sign in. Please try again.
messages.sessionLocked: This account is already signed in on another device.

VerifyEmailPage.title: Verify your email
VerifyEmailPage.description: Enter the 6-digit code sent to your email to activate your account.

messages.initialEmailFailed: We created your account, but we could not send the verification code. Please click
messages.alreadyVerified: Email is already verified. Please sign in.
messages.codeMissing: Verification code not found. Please request a new code.
messages.codeExpired: Verification code expired. Please request a new code.
messages.verifySuccess: Email verified successfully. Please sign in.
messages.notRequired: Verification is not required for this account.
messages.cooldown: Please wait before requesting another code.
messages.sendFailed: Unable to send a new code right now. Please try again.
messages.resent: A new verification code has been sent.

SettingsThemeToggle.description: Choose how the dashboard looks for you.

SettingsChangeEmailForm.title: Account Email
SettingsChangeEmailForm.description: Changing your email will be required the next time you sign in.

SettingsChangePasswordForm.title: Password
SettingsChangePasswordForm.description: Choose a strong password you do not use anywhere else.

SettingsProfilePhoto.title: Profile Photo
SettingsProfilePhoto.description: Update your avatar across the dashboard.
SettingsProfilePhoto.fileHelp: JPG, PNG, or WEBP up to 2MB.

SettingsSchoolProfileForm.title: School Profile
SettingsSchoolProfileForm.descriptionEditable: Update your school name, slug, and default currency.
SettingsSchoolProfileForm.descriptionReadOnly: Only the school owner admin can update school info.
SettingsSchoolProfileForm.viewOnly: This account can view school info but cannot edit it.

SettingsSecurity.title: Security Overview
SettingsSecurity.description: Manage your authentication options and active session controls.

twoFactor.title: Two-factor authentication
twoFactor.description: Require a one-time code on every sign in.

logoutAll.title: Logout from all devices
logoutAll.description: End every active session across your devices.

SettingsTwoFactor.title: Two-Factor Authentication
SettingsTwoFactor.description: Secure your account with a time-based one-time password (TOTP).
SettingsTwoFactor.enabledBanner: 2FA is currently enabled for your account.
